name: Solidity Smart-Contract Scanner
description: VRT-mapped static analysis of Solidity smart contracts for the Smart Contract Misconfiguration classes: reentrancy (state after external call), tx.origin authorization, unchecked low-level call returns, arbitrary delegatecall, unguarded selfdestruct, unprotected ownership/critical setters (owner takeover), integer overflow exposure on pre-0.8 pragmas, uninitialized storage pointers, and block-value randomness. Each finding carries its VRT id and SWC registry id.
author: NisargHunter AI core

path.description: directory of .sol contracts or a single .sol file

permissions.reason: Reads Solidity source files to analyze; does not compile or execute them.
